hero.hero_overview: Roger is the 39th hero in the game and is a retired soldier from the Munyan Empire who left the empire and became a hunter wandering the Land of Dawn
hero.hero_strength: Roger has two forms, human and werewolf, where he can deal damage from a distance in human mode and finish off in wolf mode, and thanks to his skills in wolf mode, it is difficult for any enemy with low health points to escape
hero.hero_weakness: Roger relies heavily on fast movement so it is recommended to use Minsatar and Khafre or use characters with movement skills to escape from Roger

spell.spell_desc: Roger is recommended to be used as a jungler and for this you should use the spell retribution

counters.counter_desc: Fanny cukup bisa mengcounter Roger, dgn strike kabelnya, Roger akan ksalahan saat teamfight

dominants.dominant_desc: Gunakan basic attack pistol Roger untuk memberikan true damage tinggi, karena dgn basic attack mode manusia Roger itu akan memberikan plus true damage yang tinggi, jika musuh sudah memiliki darah 50% kebawah, kita tinggal menggunakan ultimate untuk berubah ke mode serigala, dan gunakan burst damage di skill 1 Roger untuk finishing hero lawan
dominants.dominant_title: Fokus farming dlu, karena Roger sudah punya ulti di awal game, jdi dengan level 2 Roger bisa lawan hero yang mau gank dia

emblems.emblem_desc: Emblem assasin sangat cocok untuk Roger karena memiliki movement speed tambahan. Emblem thrill untuk tambahan 16 adaptive attack, seasoned hunter untuk tambahan damage ke Jungle, dan quantum charge untuk tambahan movement speed agar mobilitas Roger makin cepat

equips.equip_desc: Item ini sangat cocok untuk Roger, karena dengan mobilitas dan true damage Roger yang tinggi, perpaduan item diatas akan meningkatkan kekuatan Roger dari early sampai late game

hero.hero_overview: Roger adalah hero tipe fighter dan marksman yang memiliki mobilitas cukup tinggi dan true damage yang sakit, dengan di buffnya hero2 tank, kemungkinan akan banyak kita menemukan hyper tank di meta sekarang, nah Roger akan sangat cocok untuk melawan hero2 tebal tersebut, tetapi dengan mobilitasnya yang cukup tinggi, sangat diuntungkan juga untuk melawan hero2 tipe assasin di meta sekarang
hero.hero_strength: Mobilitas yang tinggi, dan true damage yang sakit
hero.hero_weakness: Hero ini sangat bagus untuk early sampai late game

cooperates.cooperate_desc: He can't escape from you, a single hit kills him. But he must be alone

counters.counter_desc: You can kill him quickly if you know how to use the first skill when he rushes at you. Just do the first skill and you will not receive any damage and you will kill him quickly.

dominants.dominant_desc: I advise you to steal the catalyst next to the turtle when you kill it. Do not cast a spell until you are sure that the enemy team is not there. Take it and take the enemy monster and make sure that there is a tank and a magician protecting you. When you get the chance, kill them.
dominants.dominant_title: You should see any opportunity to kill anyone. This hero, whenever he kills a hero, his damage increases, not in attributes, but his damage increases when you kill someone, even if you are at the maxi

emblems.emblem_desc: It depends on increasing the hitting power with each hit and also increasing the equipment power and movement speed while moving.

equips.equip_desc: You can kill anyone without difficulty, no matter who they are, but your defense is not strong, but no one will be able to escape from you
You can kill anyone but you have a defense to regain your health points and you also have a shield when your health points are low

hero.hero_overview: A good hero who can enter and exit any fight without dying if you know how to move. This hero is useful for playing alone, and I also advise you to play with two tanks in the team.
hero.hero_strength: The hero is strong and can kill all the heroes with six hits at most, while the tank takes some time, but it is impossible to kill him if you are alone, no matter what your hero is, unless you use a hero who kills one person with one hit, like Saber, then you need a shield only
hero.hero_weakness: The hero's flaws are that he has little blood and little defense that evaporates immediately, so you must move with every hit. If you are alone, I advise you to hit and move to the right, which is better. He is weak in that if he starts a match, he becomes weak and monsters are stolen from him.

data.recommend: I hope it helps people. I am a ranked player in the champion and I have played more than 1000 matches in it.

spell.spell_desc: Good sometimes, and I advise that you can hit it at the right time because you only need it to kill the heroes and escape, and I advise that you use it as soon as the monsters appear in order to kill them faster.

data.title: roger jungle

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Roger works best with heroes with high AOE damage that can nuke the enemy team to low HP for him to finish off.
Roger works best with heroes with high AOE damage that can nuke the enemy team to low HP for him to finish off.
Roger works best with Angela because of the high movement speed and the regeneration. It increases the survival and chasing ability of Roger.

counters.counter_desc: Roger is countered by heroes that can restrict his mobility and prevent him from jumping in and out using his two forms.
Roger is countered by heroes that can restrict his mobility and prevent him from jumping in and out using his two forms.

dominants.dominant_desc:
Focus on farming efficiently; prioritize buffs and jungle creeps.
Avoid unnecessary skirmishes; Roger's power spikes after Level 4.
Use Retribution to secure key objectives like the Lithowanderer.

Gank sidelanes after reaching Level 4, using Roger's wolf form for burst damage.
Target squishy heroes to build an early gold advantage.
Ensure to contest objectives like Turtle with your team.

Engage in wolf form for mobility and high damage.
Target backline heroes first, using Quantum Charge for quick repositioning.
Switch to human form for ranged poke if unable to engage directly.

emblems.emblem_desc:
The Custom Assassin Emblem enhances Roger's jungle performance and mobility. Its penetration and attack attributes amplify his burst damage, while the movement speed bonus improves his chase potential.

Talents:

Thrill: Provides extra attack power, boosting Roger's early-game damage.
Seasoned Hunter: Increases damage against Lord and Turtle, ensuring faster objectives.
Quantum Charge: Grants movement speed and HP restoration after basic attacks, enhancing sustainability and mobility in fights.

equips.equip_desc:
Explanation:
This build balances durability and burst damage, enabling Roger to sustain longer in fights while dealing significant damage.

Key Equipment:
Thunder Belt: Adds bonus true damage after abilities, great for burst and sustain.
War Axe: Increases damage during extended fights.
Sea Halberd: Counters enemies with high regen.

Explanation:
This build maximizes attack speed and sustained damage output, perfect for taking down tanky enemies.

Key Equipment:
Golden Staff: Boosts attack speed and synergy with Corrosion Scythe.
Demon Hunter Sword: Essential for shredding tanks.
Immortality: Provides survivability in late-game fights.

Explanation:
This build focuses on burst damage and mobility for chasing and eliminating squishy targets.

Key Equipment:
Windtalker: Provides attack speed and movement boost.
Berserker s Fury: Increases crit chance for massive burst.
Great Dragon Spear: Enhances mobility and physical damage.

hero.hero_overview: Roger is a versatile fighter/marksman hybrid who excels as a jungler. He switches seamlessly between ranged and melee forms, dealing consistent damage from a distance or bursting down enemies as a wolf. His farming is efficient, and his mobility enables him to snowball into team fights effectively. With proper positioning, Roger can dominate skirmishes and secure objectives.
hero.hero_strength:
Laning/Farming: Fast jungle clear with high sustain using his passive lifesteal.
Team Fight Advantages: Exceptional mobility and burst damage to target squishier opponents.
Game Phases: Strong in the mid-game when fully equipped and snowballed.
Characteristics: Flexibility between marksman and fighter roles, high mobility to chase or escape.
hero.hero_weakness:
Laning/Farming: Vulnerable in early-game jungle invades due to weak initial clear.
Team Fight Disadvantages: Struggles against heavy crowd control and tanky compositions.
Game Phases: Falls off in the late game if behind in gold or farm.
Characteristics: Requires good timing for transformations and skill usage to maximize potential.

data.recommend: This guide will help you master Roger as a jungler, covering key strategies for farming and team fights,  with the right builds, emblem, and battle spell.

spell.spell_desc:
Retribution is crucial for Roger as a jungler, boosting farming speed and granting an early game advantage. Its damage reduction ensures safety during invades.

Tips:

Use Retribution to secure buffs, creeps, and objectives.
Time it strategically to steal objectives from enemies.
Upgrade it early for better scaling and utility.

data.title: Unleashing the Beast: Roger Jungle Guide

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Angela helps roger in surviving longer as Roger needs to dive and engage enemies while leaping into the team fight
Mathilda helps roger to escape once he finishes his enemy or helps him to engage into the backlane.

counters.counter_desc: By jumping out of the way of julian enhance first skill. It's a sure kill for roger

dominants.dominant_desc: As long as you are near a lane at the early stages of the game. Help out as must as you can, Roger's first skill in human form does massive damage and you can transform to chase and take low health opponents down even in the tower. Once late game arrived and more team fights happen, try gunning down anyone in human form before you transform to wolf and chase to get a kill confirmed.
dominants.dominant_title: Farm as must as you can.

emblems.emblem_desc: As long as you have this 3 items, you can kill most tanks that invade at the start while securing the buffs

equips.equip_desc: You want to farm and kill as must as you can during the early to mid game. Having wind talker helps you to gun down enemies faster. War axe has true damage and cooldown reduction while sea halberd allows you to take down all the tanky heroes with revitalise easily with the help of your teammates. As long as you are in the wolf form, sky piercer with skill 1 does massive damage to low health enemies. As the game progress, endless battle has lifesteal and true damage to sustain longer and wipe em

hero.hero_overview: Always try to take blue buff first and don't worry about being invaded, Roger first skill will be able to damage most heroes at the start.
hero.hero_strength: Roger's advantage is early to mid, as long as your team have a good team fight you will always come out victorious.
hero.hero_weakness: Because of the nerf, you have to transform regularly

spell.spell_desc: Hardly need to explain but as a jungler it's a must spell

cooperates.cooperate_desc: Allows Roger to appear in clashes and turn it around
Roger is very tanky but he will kostly be in tower aggro range so having an angela healing over him while increasing his movement speed is a Perfect match

counters.counter_desc: With Granger becoming a part of the meta. Roger is actually a good counter against him because of his chases no matter how many time he dashes as long as you avoid Granger's skill 1 you can take him head on
Moscov only has one dash and a push back as a skill so having the close combat advantage gives you a lead in gold in early stages

dominants.dominant_desc:
Play in the long bush favoring you never play bush in the edges because you cannot use your human form skill 1 easier

Once enemy closes in prepare human form skill 1 and shoot reduce hp by 500 if both bullet connect
Immediately swap to lycan form and cast skill 1 this would push out the gold laner

Allow the minions to hit themselves dont attack the minions so the enemy gold laner will gap 

Try to contest gold crab always and be weary of roam visits

By now you would be close enough to build windtalker or you already built it, wait for windtalker then use the passive as threat.
As roam and jungle to ambush so we can take advantage in gold plates use human form to get long range attacks and use transformation as an escape
Thunderbelt stack farming use human form to cast auto basic attacks and aim at enemy so you can keep getting stacks. Remember with quantum charge as tier 3 emblem you can runaway faster

Take advantage of human form by csting skills 1 and 2 
Lycan form skill 2 stacks with human form skill 1 
Use lycan form skill 1 for the finisher

emblems.emblem_desc:
Thrill extra attack from the start can compensate early problems and increasing the chance of pickoffs

Bargain Hunter helps you scale faster on items because roger now need to have at least 3 items before it could freely be a problem

Quantum Charge increase movement speed for chases and take downs

equips.equip_desc:
Windtalkers passive Typhoon gives you magic crit damage that is very good for early damage

Tough Boots of CC reduction

Thunderbelt is good for stack gain because of his human form so by 15 minutes you should have 20

Endless to gain Healing from skills and basic attack with the inclusion of true damage from its passive

Waraxe is a good pickup because roger will go for the free hit and in clash you will get the max stacks if nobody target you

Great Dragon Spear is for chasing with its passive

hero.hero_overview: Roger did have some nerfs by adding more time to his transformation skill but by level 7 you are practically back at the old Roger and here is how you can do it
hero.hero_strength: Roger is especially good at maintaining long range while having the ability to do ambushes due to his lycan form
hero.hero_weakness: He does start weak in the early game especially when the enemy roam is in the lane

spell.spell_desc: Flicker to increase his chase or escape capability

data.title: Roger is still good even after the nerfs
